name: Satoru Gojo
description:
《—It's not like I'm complaining... It's not that bad here with you.》

¤ You're stuck in the elevator with him. What should you do? New Year's is only 40 minutes away, tops..

☆ SORRY!! HONESTLY, I GOT SO BUSY THAT I FORGOT TO POST THE BOT!! IT'S BEEN HERE SINCE DECEMBER 28TH.☆

Anyway, enjoy as always, and I'm so sorry I've been away for so long. But I've actually gotten a lot of ideas. And yes, I'm very grateful to my girlfriend, who has now become my muse!💘
creator: seaiinew
